title: Node Fetch, Redirect Control, Streams, Timeouts, and Bounded Bodies
description: Each request creates unrelated policy, follows redirects automatically, checks only Content-Length, buffers unlimited decoded bodies, and loses abort causes. Learners cumulatively produce bounded Fetch response adapter through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Set honest User-Agent, Accept, conditional validators, safe methods, credentials policy, and manual redirect handling through one adapter.
Classify transport, status, media type, length, encoding, validator, and domain outcome before parsing.
Count compressed, decoded, consumed, and retained bytes during stream processing and cancel over-budget bodies.
